steps.title: Identify the key requirement in the goal
steps.content: The goal asks to “provide an example of a country that uses the word 'dollar' in the name of its currency.” The decisive signal is “example of a country” — the answer must name a specific country and show it uses “dollar” in its currency name.

steps.title: Match the requirement to the choices
steps.content:
A provides the specific example requested: it names Kiribati and its “Kiribati dollar.” B, C, and D either make negative claims about Kiribati, explain etymological background, or generalize about multiple countries instead of naming a single example.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
